servers.name: airtable-mcp-server
servers.title: Airtable MCP Server for Claude
servers.description: Read and write records, manage bases and tables in Airtable directly from Claude
servers.installCommand: claude mcp add airtable --env AIRTABLE_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY -- npx -y airtable-mcp-server && claude mcp list

servers.name: asana-mcp-server
servers.title: Asana MCP Server for Claude
servers.description: Interact with Asana workspaces to manage projects and tasks
servers.installCommand: claude mcp list && claude mcp status asana

servers.name: aws-services-mcp-server
servers.title: AWS Services MCP Server - MCP Servers
servers.description: Comprehensive AWS cloud services integration for infrastructure management, deployment, and monitoring
servers.installCommand: uvx awslabs.core-mcp-server@latest && claude mcp list

servers.name: box-mcp-server
servers.title: Box MCP Server for Claude
servers.description: Access enterprise content, analyze unstructured data, and automate workflows
servers.installCommand: claude mcp list && claude mcp status box

servers.name: canva-mcp-server
servers.title: Canva MCP Server for Claude
servers.description: Browse, summarize, and generate Canva designs directly from Claude
servers.installCommand: claude mcp list && claude mcp status canva

servers.name: desktop-mcp-setup
servers.title: Claude Desktop MCP Setup
servers.description: Master Claude Desktop MCP server setup in 20 minutes. Complete config JSON tutorial with filesystem integration, troubleshooting, and proven solutions.
servers.installCommand: claude mcp add --transport http server-name https://api.example.com/mcp && claude mcp list

servers.name: clickup-mcp-server
servers.title: Clickup MCP Server for Claude
servers.description: Task management and project tracking with ClickUp integration
servers.installCommand: claude mcp add clickup --env CLICKUP_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY --env CLICKUP_TEAM_ID=YOUR_TEAM_ID -- npx -y @hauptsache.net/clickup-mcp && claude mcp list

servers.name: cloudflare-mcp-server
servers.title: Cloudflare MCP Server - MCP Servers
servers.description: Build applications, analyze traffic, and manage security settings through Cloudflare
servers.installCommand: claude mcp add cloudflare --env CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=YOUR_TOKEN --env CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=YOUR_ACCOUNT_ID && claude mcp list

servers.name: cloudinary-mcp-server
servers.title: Cloudinary MCP Server - MCP Servers
servers.description: Upload, manage, transform, and analyze media assets in the cloud
servers.installCommand: claude mcp add cloudinary --env CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME=YOUR_CLOUD_NAME --env CLOUDINARY_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY --env CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET=YOUR_SECRET

servers.name: contrastapi-mcp-server
servers.title: ContrastAPI Security Tools
servers.description: 49 security intelligence tools over remote MCP: CVE/KEV/CWE/EPSS lookup with composite risk score (CVSS+EPSS+KEV+PoC fusion), CVSS v3.x vector parser, domain audit, IP threat reports, IOC enrichment, dependency scanning, web intelligence (robots.txt, redirect-chain, email/brand/SEO), MITRE ATLAS AI/ML attacks, and MITRE D3FEND defenses. Anonymous tier; Pro tier with API key. Streamable-HTTP transport.
servers.installCommand: claude mcp add --transport http contrastapi https://api.contrastcyber.com/mcp/

servers.name: daloopa-mcp-server
servers.title: Daloopa MCP Server for Claude
servers.description: Access high-quality fundamental financial data from SEC filings and investor presentations
servers.installCommand: claude mcp list && claude mcp status daloopa

servers.name: discord-mcp-server
servers.title: Discord MCP Server for Claude
servers.description: Discord bot integration for community management, moderation, and server automation
servers.installCommand: npx -y @smithery/cli@latest install @SaseQ/discord-mcp --client claude && claude mcp list

servers.name: prompt-to-asset

servers.description: MCP server that generates production-ready visual assets by routing requests across 30+ image generation models. Handles app icons, favicons, OG images, logos, and wordmarks. Validates output for WCAG contrast and palette consistency. Zero API key required for first run via Pollinations and Stable Horde free tiers.
servers.installCommand: npx -y prompt-to-asset

servers.name: zyntra-mail
servers.title: Zyntra - Temp e-mails MCP
servers.description:
MCP server for e-mail testing: create disposable inboxes, wait for delivery, and extract e-mail content or links - all from your AI agent or test automation workflow.

Get a free API key on https://app.zyntra.app/
servers.installCommand: claude mcp add zyntra-mail --transport http https://mcp.zyntra.app/mcp
